title: Indian Navy SSR Medical Online Form 2026
post_name: Join Indian Navy Agniveer SSR Medical 02/2027 Batch INET 2026 Apply Online Form

fees.Navy Photo Instruction: The photo of the candidate should be after May 2026 and the background of the photo should be light and the name of the candidate and the date of taking the photo should be written in capital letters on a black slate in front of the chest on the photo.

fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / UPI Mode Only.
how_to_apply: Join Indian Navy Sailor Entry SSR Medical Branch 02/2027 Batch. Candidate Can Apply Between 14/03/2026 to 06/04/2026.

Navy Photo Instruction : The photo of the candidate should be after May 2026 and the background of the photo should be light and the name of the candidate and the date of taking the photo should be written in capital letters on a black slate in front of the chest on the photo.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Navy Sailor Entry SSR Recruitment 2026 Apply Online Form for Indian Navy Latest Sailor Entry Vacancies 2026.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
